Off Calendar Jul-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2014 Continued To Jul-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Jul-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick O'Sullivan in Propria Persona.

Mr. O'Sullivan stated that he was the Trustee for the Estate, that the house was sold, that all of the assets were distributed, that there is a $180,000.00 annuity that needs to be divided between three Beneficiaries/Siblings and that they are trying to avoid costs. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to July 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow Mr. O'Sullivan time to obtain an Attorney.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Continued To Jun-02-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
